Error Message: Variable is expected and data is collected as per define-xml document but variable has no data.
Description: Raise an error when a variable is expected, data is collected as per define-xml document but variable has no data.

Error Message: Ethnicity Term 'Spanish origin' (SUPPDM.CETHNIC) is collected but is not mapped as ETHNIC = HISPANIC OR LATINO.
Description: When ethnicity term 'Spanish origin' is collected (SUPPDM.CETHNIC), it should be mapped to Ethnicity (ETHNIC) 'HISPANIC OR LATINO' in the DM dataset

Error Message: Standards units are inconsistent within the same test (category, sub-category, specimen and method)
Description: Standard units should be consistent within the same assessment (having the same --TESTCD, --CAT, --SCAT, --SPEC, --METHOD values)

Error Message: CMTRT was not collected on CRF as per define.xml nor 'Assigned'
Description: Trigger error if CMTRT was not collected on CRF as per define.xml and is not 'Assigned' as per define.xml

Error Message: '--ENDTC value is populated but --DTC is missing.
Description: End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) is populated and related Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) is also populated.

Error Message: Variable is permissible and data is collected as per define-xml document but variable is not present in the dataset or variable has no data.
Description: Raise an error when a variable is permissible, data is collected as per define-xml document but variable is not present in the dataset or has no data.

Error Message: RACE in DM equals 'MULTIPLE' but multiple races are not collected in SUPPDM.
Description: Part C - Raise an error when RACE in DM equals 'MULTIPLE' but no multiple RACE records are present in SUPPDM.

Error Message: '--STDTC falls after --DTC.
Description: Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) is prior or equal to Date/Time of Collection (--DTC)

Error Message: Parameter is normalized by dose, and the value in PPSTRESU is not in codelist PKUDMG nor in codelist PKUDUG.
Description: Trigger error when parameter is normalized by dose and value in PPSTRESU is not for a parameter normalized by dose.

Error Message: Parameter is normalized by weight, and the value in PPSTRESU is not in codelist PKUWG nor in codelist PKUWKG.
Description: Trigger error when parameter is normalized by weight and value in PPSTRESU is not for a parameter not normalized by weight.

Error Message: Parameter is non-normalized, and the value in PPSTRESU is not in codelist PKUNIT.
Description: Trigger error when parameter is non-normalized and value in PPSTRESU is not for a non-normalized parameter.

Error Message: Parameter is non-normalized, and the value in PPORRESU is not in codelist PKUNIT.
Description: Trigger error when parameter is non-normalized and value in PPORRESU is not for a non-normalized parameter.

Error Message: Parameter is normalized by weight, and the value in PPORRESU is not in codelist PKUWG nor in codelist PKUWKG.
Description: Trigger error when parameter is normalized by weight and value in PPORRESU is not for a parameter normalized by weight.

Error Message: Parameter is normalized by dose, and the value in PPORRESU is not in codelist PKUDMG nor in codelist PKUDUG.
Description: Trigger error when parameter is normalized by dose and value in PPORRESU is not for a parameter normalized by dose.

Error Message: Variable data type specified in the dataset does not match the variable data type in the IG or the Model.
Description: Raise an error when the variable type does not match IG Type (for domains in IG) or Model Type (custom domains)

Error Message: '--BODSYS and --BDSYCD do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--BODSYS and --BDSYCD  have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: '--DECOD and --PTCD do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--DECOD and --PTCD should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: No occurrence of TSPARAMCD='CURTRT' is included in TS or TSVAL is null.
Description: At least one occurrence of TSPARAMCD='CURTRT' is included in TS with TSVAL populated.

Error Message: Variable is missing, where variable core status is permissible and data is planned to be collected.
Description: Raise an error when variable Core Status = Permissible and data is planned to be collected, but variable is not present

Error Message: '--SOCCD and --SOC do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--SOCCD and --SOC should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: '--HLGTCD and --HLGT do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--HLGTCD and --HLGT should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: '--HLTCD and --HLT do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--HLTCD and --HLT should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: '--LLTCD and --LLT do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--LLTCD and --LLT should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: Variable role specified in the define-xml does not match the variable role in the IG (for domains) or in the model (for custom domains).
Description: Raise an error when the metadata attribute of variable role does not match the IG role for domain in IG, or model role (for custom domains)

Error Message: AP DOMAIN value should start with 'AP' and length should be equal to 4.
Description: Raise an error when DOMAIN value begins with AP and length of domain variable is not 4 or DOMAIN value doesn't end with a valid SDTM domain.

Error Message: Missing LB dataset.
Description: LB dataset should be present in the submission when related data is collected.

Error Message: TAETORD does not match the order of Trial Arms
Description: Trigger error when the order of TAETORD does not match the order of Trial Arms

Error Message: '--STAT = NOT DONE, but --REASND is missing.
Description: When a test is not done (--STAT = NOT DONE), the Reason Not Done (--REASND) should be populated.

Error Message: TSVALCD is not a valid code in the CDISC CT version identified in TSVCDVER.
Description: Raise an error when TSVCDREF ='CDISC' and TSVALCD is not a valid code in the version identified in TSVCDVER.

Error Message: Variables not listed in the Model List of Allowed Variables for Observation Class should be in SUPPQUAL.
Description: Raise an error when a variable is not an allowed variable for an Observation Class

Error Message: Variables not listed in the Model List of Allowed Variables for Observation Class should be in SUPPQUAL.
Description: Raise an error when a variable is not an allowed variable for an Observation Class

Error Message: No occurrence of TSPARAMCD='CURTRT' is included in TS or TSVAL is null.The count of occurrences of TSPARAMCD = <value> not in the set ('FCNTRY', 'OBJPRIM', 'OBJSEC', 'OUTMSPRI', .'OUTMSSEC', 'RANDQT', 'REGID', 'TITLE', 'TTYPE') included in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated is gt 1.
Description: The count of occurrences of TSPARAMCD = <value> not in the set ('FCNTRY', 'OBJPRIM', 'OBJSEC', 'OUTMSPRI', .'OUTMSSEC', 'RANDQT', 'REGID', 'TITLE', 'TTYPE') included in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated is eq 1.

Error Message: Subject is assigned to an arm code (randomized) but has no record in EX.
Description: If a subject is assigned to an arm, the subject should have a record in EX.

Error Message: Subject is assigned to an arm (randomized) but has no record in EX.
Description: If a subject is assigned to an arm code, the subject should have a record in EX.

Error Message: Subject is assigned to an arm code (randomized) but has no record in EX.
Description: If a subject is assigned to an arm, the subject should have a record in EX.

Error Message: The count of occurrences of TSPARAMCD = PCLASS is in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated is gt 1.
Description: The count of occurrences of TSPARAMCD = PCLASS is in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated is gt 1.

Error Message: The set (EGBLIND, EGCTMON, EGLEADPR, EGLEADSM, EGRDMETH, EGREPLBL, EGREPLTR, EGTWVALG) is included in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated.
Description: The set (EGBLIND, EGCTMON, EGLEADPR, EGLEADSM, EGRDMETH, EGREPLBL, EGREPLTR, EGTWVALG) is included in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated.

Error Message: TSPARAMCD=DCUTDESC and TSPARAMCD=DCUTDTC do not share the same TSGRPID and TSVAL values.
Description: TSPARAMCD=DCUTDESC and TSPARAMCD=DCUTDTC do not share the same TSGRPID and TSVAL values.

Error Message: TSVAL (Standard Name) does not match corresponding name as listed in section 5.2 of the TCG for TAUGs and is in the CTAUGRS codelist (C160925), as published in the CDISC Library.
Description: Raise an issue when TSVAL (Standard Name) does not match corresponding name as listed in section 5.2 of the TCG for TAUGs and is in the CTAUGRS codelist (C160925), as published in the CDISC Library.

Error Message: Not all trial design datasets as listed in the corresponding IG have been submitted.
Description: All trial design datasets as listed in the corresponding IG should be present in the submission.

Error Message: '--STDTC falls after RFPENDTC.
Description: Start Date/Time (--STDTC) should be prior or equal to the Date/Time of End of Participation (RFPENDTC)

Error Message: EXENDTC falls after the last DSSTDTC.
Description: End Date/Time of Treatment (EXENDTC) should be prior or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC).

Error Message: EXSTDTC falls after the last DSSTDTC.
Description: Start Date/Time of Treatment (EXSTDTC) should be prior or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC).

Error Message: A subject has a record in EX but is not assigned to a treatment while participating in an interventional study
Description: All subjects in the Exposure domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product must be assigned to a treatment.

Error Message: DM dataset is missing.
Description: DM dataset should be present.
Standard Name: SDTMIG, TIG, SENDIG, SENDIG-GENETOX, SENDIG-DART, SENDIG-AR

Error Message: TSVAL where TSPARMCD = SSTDTC is not in ISO 8601 format.
Description: Study Start Date (SSTDTC) value in the TS dataset should be populated in ISO 8601 format.

Error Message: Missing TSPARMCD = SSTDTC record in TS dataset.
Description: FDA desired parameter Study Start Date (SSTDTC) should be present in the TS domain.

Error Message: Missing TS dataset.
Description: TS dataset is present in the submission.

Error Message: PCSPEC is not equal to PPSPEC for the same drug or metabolite.
Description: For the same drug or metabolite (PCTEST), specimen type (PCSPEC) should be consistent across pharmacokinetic datasets within a submission.

Error Message: Race Term 'Haitian' or 'Negro' is collected (SUPPDM.CRACE) but is not mapped to RACE = BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN in DM dataset.
Description: When Race Term 'Haitian' or 'Negro' (SUPPDM.CRACE) is collected, it should be mapped to Race (RACE) 'BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN' in the DM dataset.

Error Message: '--ELTM is populated, but --TPTREF is missing.
Description: When Planned Elapsed Time from Time Point Ref (--ELTM) is populated, Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) should also be populated.

Error Message: '--STINT is populated, but --TPTREF is missing.
Description: When Planned Start of Assessment Interval (--STINT) is populated, Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) should also be populated.

Error Message: '--ENINT is populated, but --TPTREF is missing.
Description: When Planned End of Assessment Interval (--ENINT) is populated, Time Point Reference (--TPTREF) should also be populated.

Error Message: End timepoint is populated but start timepoint is missing.
Description: When Eed timepoint (--ENDTC, --ENRF or --ENRTPT) is populated, related start timepoint (--STDTC, --STRF or --STRTPT should also be populated.

Error Message: Negative value for --PDUR.
Description: Planned Duration (--PDUR) value should not be negative.

Error Message: Negative value for --DUR.
Description: Collected Duration (--DUR) value should not be negative.

Error Message: Negative value for --VAMT.
Description: Value for Treatment Vehicle Amount (--VAMT) should not be negative.

Error Message: Negative value for --DOSTOT.
Description: Total Daily Dose (--DOSTOT) value should not be negative.

Error Message: Negative value for --DOSE.
Description: Dose (--DOSE) value should not be negative

Error Message: Negative value for AGE.
Description: Age (AGE) value should not be negative

Error Message: '--ORNRHI is less than or equal to --ORNRLO.
Description: Normal Range Upper Limit-Original Units (--ORNRHI) is greater than the Normal Range Lower Limit-Original Units (--ORNRLO).

Error Message: '--STNRHI is less than or equal to --STNRLO.
Description: Normal Range Upper Limit-Standard Units (--STNRHI) should be greater than the Normal Range Lower Limit-Standard Units (--STNRLO).

Error Message: Timing information is collected but not submitted.
Description: Timing information should be submitted when collected.'

Error Message: '--TPTREF value is missing when --RFTDTC is populated.
Description: Time point reference (--TPTREF) should be populated when reference time point (--RFTDTC) is populated.
Standard Name: SDTMIG, SENDIG, SENDIG-DART, SENDIG-GENETOX, TIG, SENDIG-AR

Error Message: '--TPTREF is missing when --RFTDTC is present.
Description: Time point reference (--TPTREF) should be present in the dataset, when reference time point (--RFTDTC) is also present in the dataset.
Standard Name: SDTMIG, TIG, SENDIG, SENDIG-GENETOX, SENDIG-DART, SENDIG-AR

Error Message: RFCSTDTC falls after RFCENDTC.
Description: Date/Time of First Challenge Agent Admin (RFCSTDTC) should be prior or equal to the Date/Time of Last Challenge Agent Admin (RFCENDTC).

Error Message: RFICDTC falls after RFXSTDTC.
Description: Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) should be prior or equal to the Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC).

Error Message: RFICDTC falls after RFSTDTC.
Description: Date/Time of Informed Consent (RFICDTC) should be prior or equal to the Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC).

Error Message: RFXSTDTC falls after RFXENDTC.
Description: Date/Time of First Study Treatment (RFXSTDTC) variable value should be prior or equal to the Date/Time of Last Study Treatment (RFXENDTC).

Error Message: '--ENDTC falls after RFPENDTC.
Description: End Date/Time (--ENDTC) variable value should be prior or equal to the Date/Time of End of Participation (RFPENDTC).

Error Message: '--DTC falls after RFPENDTC.
Description: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) variable value should be prior or equal to Date/Time of End of Participation (RFPENDTC).

Error Message: RFSTDTC falls after RFENDTC.
Description: Subject Reference Start Date/Time (RFSTDTC) should be prior or equal to the Subject Reference End Date/Time (RFENDTC).

Error Message: AESTDTC falls after the last DSSTDTC.
Description: Start Date/Time of Adverse Event (AESTDTC) should be prior or equal to the Start Date/Time of the latest Disposition Event (DSSTDTC).

Error Message: '--DY is greater than --ENDY.
Description: Study Day of Visit/Collection/Exam (--DY) should be less than or equal to Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY).

Error Message: '--STDY is greater than --ENDY.
Description: When Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY) is present in the dataset, then the End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) should also be present in the dataset.

Error Message: End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) variable is missing when Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY) is present.
Description: When Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY) is present in the dataset, then the End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) is also present in the dataset

Error Message: Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) variable is missing when Study Day of Start of Observation (--STDY) is present.
Description: When Study Day of Start of Observation (--STDY) is present in the dataset, then the Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) is also present in the dataset.

Error Message: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) variable is missing when Study Day of Visit/Collection/Exam (--DY) is present.
Description: When Study Day of Visit/Collection/Exam (--DY) is present in the dataset, then the Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) should also be present in the dataset

Error Message: Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY) variable is missing when End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) is present.
Description: When End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC) is present in the dataset, then the Study Day of End of Observation (--ENDY) should also be present in the dataset

Error Message: Study Day of Visit/Collection/Exam (--DY) variable is missing when Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) is present.
Description: When Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) is present in the dataset, then the Study Day of Visit/Collection/Exam (--DY) should also present in the dataset.

Error Message: '--DTC falls after --ENDTC.
Description: Date/Time of Collection (--DTC) should be prior or equal to the End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC)

Error Message: '--STDTC falls after  --ENDTC.
Description: Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) should be prior or equal to the End Date/Time of Observation (--ENDTC).

Error Message: AEENDTC is missing, when AEOUT = RECOVERED/RESOLVED.
Description: When Adverse Event Outcome (AEOUT) is populated with RECOVERED/RESOLVED, then the End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) should be populated.

Error Message: AEENDTC is populated, when AEOUT = NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED.
Description: When Adverse Event Outcome (AEOUT) is populated with 'NOT RECOVERED/NOT RESOLVED', then the End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) should not be populated

Error Message: EPOCH is missing for clinical subject-level observation.
Description: EPOCH should be populated for clinical subject-level observations.

Error Message: '--ENDTC does not fall on or between RFXSTDTC and RFENDTC.
Description: Treatment exposure end date/time (--ENDTC) should fall on or between first (RFXSTDTC) and last (RFXENDTC) study treatment date/time in the DM dataset.

Error Message: '--STDTC does not fall on or between RFXSTDTC and RFENDTC.
Description: Treatment exposure start date/time (--STDTC) should fall on or between first (RFXSTDTC) and last (RFXENDTC) study treatment date/time in the DM dataset.

Error Message: A new term has been added to a non-extensible code list.
Description: When CDISC published Controlled Terminology indicates that a codelist is non-extensible then only terms from the codelist should be used.

Error Message: The length of the variable is longer than the data within the variable
Description: The length of each variable cannot be different between datasets and should not be longer than the maximum length of the data contained by the variable

CDISC Rule ID: CG0006, TIG0291, SEND73, TIG0274, SEND74, TIG0275, FB1603
Error Message: '--DY is not correctly calculated even though the date portion of --DTC is complete, the date portion of RFSTDTC is complete, and --DY is not empty.
Description: Raise an error when --DY is not calculated as per the study day algorithm as a non-zero integer value when the date portion of --DTC is complete and the date portion of DM.RFSTDTC is a complete date AND --DY is not empty
Standard Name: SDTMIG, TIG, SENDIG, SENDIG-DART, SENDIG-GENETOX, SENDIG-AR

Error Message: Collection study day (--DY) is not populated when date/time of collection (--DTC) is populated.
Description: Collection study day (--DY) should be populated when date/time of collection (--DTC) is populated

Error Message: Collection study day (--DY) is missing when date/time of collection (--DTC) is populated.
Description: Collection study day (--DY) should be present when date/time of collection (--DTC) is populated

Error Message: Text variable contains '.' as an entire value.
Description: Text variable in submitted dataset should not contain  '.' as an entire value.

Error Message: Text variable contains leading spaces.
Description: Text variable in submitted dataset should not contain leading spaces ' '.

Error Message: Missing DSCAT value for Disposition Event.
Description: Category for Disposition Event (DSCAT) should be populated.

Error Message: Dataset PC is missing
Description: PC dataset is present in the submission

Error Message: Records are not unique as per sponsor defined key variables as documented in the define.xml
Description: Trigger error if records are not unique as per sponsor defined key variables as documented in the define.xml

Error Message: '--TPT and --TPTNUM do not have a one-to-one relationship per unique value of --TPTREF.
Description: VISITNUM not present in dataset and --TPTREF present in dataset then --TPT and --TPTNUM should have a one-to-one relationship per unique values of --TPTREF.

Error Message: '--TPT and --TPTNUM do not have a one-to-one relationship per unique combination of VISITNUM and --TPTREF values.
Description: VISITNUM and --TPTREF are present then --TPT and --TPTNUM should have a one-to-one relationship per unique combination of VISITNUM and --TPTREF values.

Error Message: '--TPT and --TPTNUM do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: VISITNUM and --TPTREF are not present then --TPT and --TPTNUM should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: '--TPT and --TPTNUM do not have a one-to-one relationship per unique value of VISITNUM.
Description: VISITNUM is present in the dataset and --TPTREF is not present in the dataset then --TPT and --TPTNUM should have a one-to-one relationship per unique value of VISITNUM.

Error Message: QNAM and QLABEL do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: QNAM and QLABEL should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: VISIT and VISITNUM do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: When VISITNUM is present in TV, VISIT and VISITNUM should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: TSPARM and TSPARMCD do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: TSPARMCD and TSPARM should have a one-to-one relationship.
Standard Name: SDTMIG, TIG, SENDIG, SENDIG-GENETOX, SENDIG-DART, SENDIG-AR

Error Message: IETESTCD and IETEST do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: IETESTCD and IETEST should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: Missing treatment-emergent flag (AETRTEM) for Adverse Event.
Description: Treatment-emergent flag should be present in SUPPAE for each Adverse Event.

Error Message: OIPARMCD and OIPARM do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: OIPARMCD and OIPARM should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: ETCD and ELEMENT do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: ETCD and ELEMENT should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: INVNAM and INVID do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: INVID and INVNAM shoumd have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: '--CLASCD and --CLAS do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--CLASCD and --CLAS should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: ACTARMCD and ACTARM do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: ACTARMCD and ACTARM should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: ARMCD and ARM do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: ARMCD and ARM should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: '--TESTCD and --TEST do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: '--TESTCD and --TEST should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: TSVALCD and TSVAL do not have a one-to-one relationship.
Description: TSVALCD and TSVAL should have a one-to-one relationship.

Error Message: SSTRESC in SS dataset is "DEAD", but a record is missing in DS dataset where DSDECOD = "DEATH".
Description: When survival status is completed as 'DEAD' in the SS dataset then a record should be present in the DS dataset where DSDECOD = 'DEATH' for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: SSTRESC in SS dataset is "DEAD", but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
Description: When survival status is completed as 'DEAD' in the SS dataset then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: SSDTC in SS dataset where SSTRESC = 'DEAD' is not equal to or after the DTHDTC in the DM dataset.
Description: Date/time of collection of subject status in SS dataset where survival status (SSSTRESC) = 'DEAD' should be equal to or after the Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: AEENDTC in AE dataset of AE where AEOUT = 'FATAL' is not equal to DTHDTC in the DM dataset.
Description: End Date/Time of Adverse Event (AEENDTC) in AE dataset of Adverse Event where AEOUT = 'FATAL' should be equal to the Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: DTHDTC is populated but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
Description: When Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset is populated then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: DTHFL is "Y", but DTHDTC is not populated in the DM dataset.
Description: When Death flag (DTHFL) in the DM dataset is populated as 'Y' then Date/Time of Death (DTHDTC)should be populated in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: DSSTDTC for DEATH record in DS dataset is not equal to DTHDTC in the DM dataset.
Description: Disposition date time (DSSTDTC) for DEATH record in the DS dataset should be equal to the Date of Death (DTHDTC) in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: DTHFL in DM dataset is "Y" but a record is missing in AE dataset where AESDTH = "Y" and AEOUT = "FATAL".
Description: When Death flag (DTHFL) in the DM dataset is populated as 'Y' then a record should be present in the AE dataset where AEOUT = 'FATAL' and AESDTH = 'Y' for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: DTHFL in DM dataset is "Y" but a record is missing in DS dataset where DSDECOD = "DEATH".
Description: When Death flag (DTHFL) in the DM dataset is populated as 'Y' then a record should be present in the DS dataset where DSDECOD = 'DEATH' for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: CETERM or CEDECOD is 'DEATH' in CE dataset, but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
Description: When a record is present in the CE dataset where CETERM or CEDECOD  = 'DEATH' then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: DSDECOD is 'DEATH' in DS dataset, but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
Description: When a record is present in the DS dataset where DSDECOD = 'DEATH' then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: AESDTH is 'Y' in AE dataset, but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
Description: When a record is present in the AE dataset where AESDTH = 'Y' then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: AEOUT is 'FATAL' in AE dataset, but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
Description: When a record is present in the AE dataset where AEOUT = 'FATAL' then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the  corresponding subject.

Error Message: DD record is present, but DTHFL in DM dataset is not "Y".
Description: When a record is present in the DD dataset then death flag (DTHFL) should be populated as 'Y' in the DM dataset for the corresponding subject.

Error Message: Age is missing for a non-screen failure subject.
Description: Age should be provided for all subjects, except where not collected for screen failures.

Error Message: '--DECOD is completed but value is not a valid MedDRA preferred TERM.
Description: Raise an error when --DECOD is completed but is not a valid MedDRA preferred TERM.

Error Message: Subject has a no record in EX but is assigned to a treatment while participating in an interventional study
Description: All subjects that have no record in the Exposure domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product should not be assigned to a treatment.

Error Message: Length of ARMCD must be less than or equal to 20 characters
Description: Verify that ARMCD in TA domain is valid planned arm code

Error Message: A subject has a record in DM but not in EX while participating in an interventional study
Description: All subjects in the Demographics domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product must have at least one corresponding record in the Exposure domain, except for subjects who failed screening, were not fully assigned to an Arm, or did not receive study treatment.

Error Message: CMDECOD must be populated when CMTRT is populated
Description: Raise an error when CMTRT is populated, CMDECOD is empty

Error Message: CMDECOD must be populated when CMTRT is populated
Description: Raise an error when CMTRT is populated, CMDECOD is empty

Error Message: EPOCH should be null if DSCAT is protocol milestone
Description: Raise an error when DSCAT = "PROTOCOL MILESTONE" but EPOCH is not equal to null.

Error Message: '--REPNUM is null or is not unique per subject per test per timing variables.
Description: Raise an error when REPNUM is in the dataset and there are multiple records for a subject for a test within the timeframe identified by the timing variables on the record, and --REPNUM is null or not unique per subject per test per timing variables.

Error Message: TSVAL is not a valid preferred term from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS)
Description: TSVAL is a valid preferred term from FDA Substance Registration System (SRS)

Error Message: Missing one or more TDM dataset(s)
Description: All TDM dataset(s) for the corresponding IG should be included in every submission.

Error Message: AP Core Domain does not have a value length of 4 characters beginning with 'AP' and ending with 2 character SDTM domain
Description: Raise an error when an AP Core Domain does not have a value length of 4 characters beginning with 'AP' and ending with 2 character SDTM domain

Error Message: Collected data fits a Qualifier variable listed in specified SDTM Sections and are represented in the Findings About domain, and the name of the variable is used as FATESTCD
Description: Trigger error when collected data fits a Qualifier variable listed in specified SDTM Sections and are represented in the Findings About domain, and the name of the variable is used as FATESTCD

Error Message: The variable is under controlled terminology, but no codelist has been defined for it in the define.xml
Description: Variables that are under CT must have an associated codelist defined in the define.xml

Error Message: USUBJID is not found in DM.USUBJID
Description: Trigger error when domain is not an AP-- domain and USUBJID is not present in DM.USUBJID

Error Message: Variable value for --DUR does not comply with ISO-8601-duration format
Value for IDVAR in CO does not represent a variable present in the dataset referenced in RDOMAIN.
Description: Part C - Raise and error when IDVAR in CO is not populated with a valid variable from the dataset referenced in RDOMAIN.

Error Message: Value for IDVAR in RELREC does not represent a variable present in the dataset referenced in RDOMAIN.
Description: Part B - Raise and error when IDVAR in RELREC is not populated with a valid variable from the dataset referenced in RDOMAIN.

Error Message: Value for IDVAR in SUPP-- does not represent a variable present in the dataset referenced in RDOMAIN.
Description: Part A - Raise and error when IDVAR in SUPP-- is not populated with a valid variable from the dataset referenced in RDOMAIN.

Error Message: Issue with codelist definition in the Define-XML document.
Description: Testing rule type Variables Metadata Check against Define XML and Library Metadata

Error Message: '--STRESC is numeric but --STRESN is not populated or not equal to --STRESC.
Description: Raise an error when --STRESC is populated with a numeric value, but --STRESN is not populated, or --STRESN is not equal to --STRESC.
Standard Name: SENDIG, SENDIG-DART, SENDIG-GENETOX, TIG, SDTMIG, SENDIG-AR

Error Message: RDOMAIN has a missing value when IDVARVAL has a non-missing value.
Description: Raise an error when RDOMAIN is null when IDVARVAL is not null.

Error Message: Multiple races are collected in SUPPDM but RACE in DM does not equal "MULTIPLE".
Description: Raise an error when multiple races are collected in SUPPDM but RACE in DM does not equal "MULTIPLE".

Error Message: Missing AESMIE=Y where SUPPAE.QNAM=AESOSP
Description: When SUPPAE.QNAM=AESOSP is present, a record with AESMIE=Y should be present

Error Message: Ethnicity has been collected but the values is not mapped to "HISPANIC OR LATINO" or "NOT HISPANIC OR LATINO"
Description: When Ethnicity was collected and it was not mapped as "HISPANIC OR LATINO" or "NOT HISPANIC OR LATINO".

Error Message: IDVARVAL does not equal a value of the variable referenced by IDVAR in domain = RDOMAIN.
Description: When IDVAR is populated, IDVARVAL must equal a value of the variable referenced by IDVAR within the domain referenced by RDOMAIN

Error Message: An appropriate identifier is not present; USUBJID, APID, SPDEVID, SPTOBID, POOLID, SPTOBID, STOCONID should be present.
Description: APID is required in all Associated Persons Data. In addition to STUDYID, DOMAIN, and --SEQ being required for all domains based on one of the 3 general observation classes, one of USUBJID, APID, SPDEVID, or POOLID must also be present.

Error Message: Test message
MIDS is not suffixed with a sequence number in consistent chronological order with SMSTDTC.
Description: Trigger error when MIDSTYPE=TM.MIDSTYPE and TM.TMRPT=Y and MIDS is not suffixed with a sequence number in consistent chronological order

Error Message: DOMAIN Code is not a published DOMAIN Code in CDISC Controlled Terminology.
Description: Raise and error when the DOMAIN Code is not a valid Domain Code published by CDISC.

Error Message: A subject has a record in EX but is not assigned to a treatment while participating in an interventional study
Description: All subjects in the Exposure domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product must be assigned to an ARM.

Error Message: '--LLT is not a valid MedDRA lowest level TERM.
Description: Raise an error when --LLT is not a valid MedDRA lowest level TERM.

Error Message: '--LLTCD is not a valid MedDRA lowest level code.
Description: Raise an error when --LLTCD is not a valid MedDRA lowest level code.

Error Message: There are multiple records per assigned last observation before exposure flag (--LOBXFL).
Description: There should be only one record with a last observation before exposure flag and non missing character standard result value having the same --TESTCD, --CAT, --SCAT, --SPEC, --METHOD values.

Error Message: There are multiple records per assigned baseline flag (--BLFL).
Description: There should be only one record with a baseline flag and non missing character standard result value having the same --TESTCD, --CAT, --SCAT, --SPEC, --METHOD values.

Error Message: TAETORD is not an integer
Description: TAETORD must be an integer

Error Message: STRAIN is present.
Description: Raise an error when STRAIN is present.

Error Message: There is more than one record per subject per EPOCH
Description: Trigger error when there is more than one record per subject per EPOCH

Error Message: TSVAL does not conform to ISO 8601
Description: When TSPARMCD is equal to AGEMIN and TSVAL is not null, TSVAL should conform to ISO 8601

Error Message: TSVAL is not NULL and does not conform to ISO 8601 time period
Description: When TSPARMCD = LENGTH and TSVAL ^= NULL, TSVAL needs to conform to ISO 8601 time period

Error Message: Interventions parent record exists and --DECOD = null, but FAOBJ is not equal to --TRT.
Description: When findings are collected about an intervention, and the interventions parent record exists and --DECOD = null, FAOBJ should be equal to --TRT.

Error Message: The values of PPCAT and PCTEST do not match at the same reference timepoint
Description: The values of PPCAT and PCTEST do not match at the same reference timepoint

Error Message: ECDOSE is empty, ECOCCUR is not equal to 'N' and ECSTAT is empty, but ECDOSTXT is also empty.
Description: Raise an error when ECDOSE is empty, ECOCCUR is not equal to 'N', ECSTAT is empty and ECDOSTXT is empty

Error Message: ECOCCUR is not 'N', ECSTAT and ECDOSTXT are both empty but ECDOSE is less than or equal to 0.
Description: Raise an error when ECOCCUR is not equal to 'N', ECSTAT and ECDOSTXT are both empty but ECDOSE less than or equal to 0.

Error Message: The length of the variable is longer than the data within the variable
Description: All variables in each of the SUPPQUAL and RELREC datasets have a length that is not longer than the length of the longest value for that variable.

Error Message: AGE and AGETXT are in the list of TSPARAMCDs with TSVAL populated.
Description: Either AGE or AGETXT is in the list of TSPARMCDs with TSVAL populated, not both.

Error Message: A subject has a record in DM but not in EX while participating in an interventional study
Description: All subjects in the Demographics domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product must have at least one corresponding record in the Exposure domain, except for subjects who failed screening, were not fully assigned to an Arm, or did not receive study treatment.

Error Message: A subject has a no record in EX but is not populated ARMNRS while participating in an interventional study
Description: All subjects that have no record in the Exposure domain who are participating in a study that includes an interventional product should have ARMNRS populated.

Error Message: '--LOBXFL = 'Y', but --STRESC is empty.
Description: Raise an error when --LOBXFL = 'Y' and --STRESC is empty.

Error Message: '--TESTCD does not exist in custom Findings domain.
Description: Raise an error when variable --TESTCD is missing for custom Findings domains

Error Message: '--STRESC is populated with a numeric value, but --STRESN is not populated.
Description: When --STRESC is populated with a numeric value, --STRESN should be populated.

Error Message: '--STRESC is not numeric but --STRESN is not empty
Description: '--STRESC is not populated with a numeric value, but --STRESN is not empty.

Error Message: RACE in DM equals 'MULTIPLE' but multiple races are not collected in SUPPDM.
Description: Part A - Raise an error when RACE in DM equals 'MULTIPLE' and SUPPDM dataset is not present.

Error Message: Variables are not in the correct order as shown in SDTM for the observation class.
Description: Raise an error when variables are not in the specified order

Error Message: Subject has no records in EX but ACTARMCD is not equal to SCRNFAIL, NOTASSGN or NOTTRT.
Description: Raise an error when subject has no records in EX but ACTARMCD is not equal to SCRNFAIL, NOTASSGN or NOTTRT.

Error Message: EPOCH values don't match between Subject Visits (SV) and Subject Elements (SE) datasets.
Description: Raise an error when variable EPOCH values don't match between Subject Visits (SV) and Subject Elements (SE) datasets.

Error Message: The set of parameters without conditions listed in the TCG, Appendix B, is not included in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated.
Description: The set of parameters without conditions listed in the TCG, Appendix B, is not included in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated.

Error Message: No occurrence of TSPARMCD=’CRMDUR’ is included in TS or TSVAL is null.
Description: No occurrence of TSPARMCD=’CRMDUR’ is included in TS or TSVAL is null.

Error Message: TSVAL (Standard Name) does not match corresponding name as listed in on the study data standards resources website for technical specification documents.
Description: TSVAL (Standard Name) matches corresponding name as listed on the study data standards resources website for technical specification documents.

Error Message: At least one Required variable has a null value
Description: Part B: Raise an error when a Required variable is null.

Error Message: Visit Day cannot be found in Trial Visit (TV) domain
Description: Verify that visitdy is planned and exists in TV

Error Message: SUPP--.RDOMAIN does not represent a dataset present in the study
Description: Trigger error when SUPP--.RDOMAIN does not represent a dataset present in the study

Error Message: AGEU is completed, but both AGE and AGETXT are not completed.
Description: Raise an error when AGEU is completed but both AGETXT and AGE are not completed.

Error Message: Variable label is not in title case.
Description: Raise an error when a variable label is not in title case

Error Message: RFSTDTC must not be null when ACTARM is not in (Screen Failure, Not Assigned, Not Treated.
Description: Raise an error when RFSTDTC is null, but ACTARM is neither Screen Failure, Not Assigned, nor Not Treated

Error Message: RFSTDTC must be null when ACTARM in (Screen failure, Not Assigned, Not Treated).
Description: Raise an error when RFSTDTC is not null, but ACTARM is either Screen Failure, Not Assigned, or Not Treated

Error Message: RFENDTC must not be null when ACTARM is a value other than Screen Failure, Not Assigned, or Not Treated.
Description: Raise an error when RFENDTC is null, but ACTARM is not Screen Failure, Not Assigned, or Not Treated

Error Message: RFENDTC must be null when ACTARM in (Screen Failure, Not Assigned, Not Treated).
Description: Raise an error when RFENDTC is not null, but ACTARM is Screen Failure, Not Assigned, or Not Treated

Error Message: ARM should be equal to ACTARM when ARM is Screen Failure or Not Assigned.
Description: ACTARM value must match ARM value in Demographics when ARM equals "Screen Failure" or "Not Assigned"

Error Message: ARM is not in TA.ARM, but ARM in DM does not equal Screen Failure or Not Assigned.
Description: ARM values in Demographics are restricted to ARM values in Trial Arms when not equal to "Screen Failure" or "Not Assigned"

Error Message: ACTARM should be equal to ARM when ACTARM is Screen Failure or Not Assigned.
Description: Raise an error when ACTARM is Screen Failure or Not Assigned, and ACTARM does not equal ARM

Error Message: ACTARM is not in TA.ARM, but ACTARM in DM does not equal Screen Failure, Not Assigned, Not Treated, or Unplanned Treatment.
Description: Raise an error when no TA.ARM exists for ACTARM in DM and ACTARM does not equal Screen Failure, Not Assigned, Not Treated, or Unplanned Treatment in DM

Error Message: '--ELTM is not the same value across records with the same values of DOMAIN, VISITNUM, --TPTREF, and --TPTNUM.
Description: Raise an error when --TPT ^= null and --TPTNUM ^= null and --ELTM ^= null and --ELTM does not have the same value across records with the same values of DOMAIN, VISITNUM, --TPTREF, and --TPTNUM.

Error Message: LBSTNRC is populated when LBORRES is a continuous measurement
Description: When LBORRES is a continuous measurement, LBSTNRC should be null

Error Message: RACE in DM equals 'MULTIPLE' but multiple races are not collected in SUPPDM.
Description: Part B -  Raise an error when RACE in DM equals 'MULTIPLE' but no records are present in SUPPDM.

Error Message: No timing variable is provided
Description: There must be at least one timing variable for any of the domains based on the three general observation classes

Error Message: SVUPDES is not populated or does not exist, but the VISIT does not equal a VISIT present in TV
Description: Raise an error when SVUPDES is null and SV.VISIT is not in TV.VISIT

Error Message: SVUPDES is populated, but the VISITNUM equals a VISITNUM present in TV
Description: When SVUPDES is populated, then the VISITNUM should not be equal to a VISITNUM in TV

Error Message: SVUPDES is not populated or does not exist, but the VISITNUM does not equal a VISITNUM present in TV
Description: When SVUPDES is not populated, then the VISITNUM should be equal to a VISITNUM in TV

Error Message: '--SEQ is not a unique number per USUBJID per domain, nor a unique number per POOLID per domain, including when the domain is split into multiple files
Description: Excluding TS.TSSEQ, raise an error when --SEQ is not a unique number per USUBJID per domain, or not a unique number per POOLID per domain, including when the domain is split into multiple files.

Error Message: TSVAL is not populated with an ISO 21090 null flavor or null flavor description but TSVALNF is populated.
Description: Raise and error when TSVAL is not populated TSVAL is populated with values or synonyms of values in the ISO 21090 null flavor codelist (or other terms that can be represented as null flavors) but TSVALNF is completed.

Error Message: At least one expected variable is missing from dataset
Description: Raise an error when an expected variable is not present in the dataset.

Error Message: TSVAL is populated with an ISO 21090 null flavor or null flavor description.
Description: Raise an error when TSVALNF is empty and TSVAL is populated with values or synonyms of values in the ISO 21090 null flavor codelist (or other terms that can be represented as null flavors)

Error Message: The Study Day of Start of Observation (--STDY) is not present in the dataset when Start Date/Time of Observation (--STDTC) is present.
Description: Study Day of Start (--STDY) variable should be included into dataset, when Start Study Date/Time (--STDTC) variable is present.

Error Message: IESCAT exists in a dataset, but IECAT does not exist.
Description: Part B - Raise an error when IESCAT exists in a dataset, but IECAT does not exist.

Error Message: IECAT should not be null when IESCAT is populated
Description: Part B - Raise an error when IESCAT is not empty, but IECAT is empty.

Error Message: TAETORD values don't match between Subject Visits (SV) and Subject Elements (SE) datasets.
Description: Raise an error when variable TAETORD values don't match between Subject Visits (SV) and Subject Elements (SE) datasets.

Error Message: SUPP--.QNAM is present in the dataset, but the value of SUPP--.QNAM equals a variable name defined in the corresponding SDTM version.
Description: Raise an error when SUPP--.QNAM is present in dataset, but value of SUPP--.QNAM is equal to a variable name defined in the corresponding SDTM version.

Error Message: The combination of TESTRL, TEENRL, and TEDUR is not unique for each ETCD.
Description: The combination of TESTRL, TEENRL, and TEDUR must be unique for each ETCD.

Error Message: TDSTOFF is not equal to zero or a positive value in ISO 8601 Duration format
Description: TDSTOFF must be equal to 0 or a positive value in ISO 8601 Duration format

Error Message: TP dataset is present.
Description: Raise an error when TP dataset is present.

Error Message: TT dataset is present.
Description: Raise an error when TT dataset is present.

Error Message: '--SCAT exists in a dataset, but --CAT does not exist.
Description: Part A - Raise an error when --SCAT exists in a dataset, but --CAT does not exist.

Error Message: '--CAT should not be null when --SCAT is populated
Description: Part A - Raise an error when --SCAT is not empty, but --CAT is empty.

Error Message: Associated Persons non-supplemental qualifier dataset associated with a split dataset does not have a dataset name with a length greater than 4 and less than, or equal to, 6.
Description: When an Associated Persons non-supplemental qualifier dataset is associated with a split dataset, the dataset name length must be greater than 4 and less than, or equal to, 6.

Error Message: TM dataset is missing when RELMIDS variable is present in any of the dataset.
Description: Raise an error when variable RELMIDS is present in any of the dataset and TM dataset is missing in a study.

Error Message: Parent record exists and --DECOD is not null, but FAOBJ is not equal to --DECOD.
Description: When findings are collected, and the parent record exists and --DECOD is not null, FAOBJ should not be equal to --DECOD

Error Message: Related record is present in the parent domain dataset and "Other, specify" value was coded.
Description: When findings are collected, and the Events parent record exists and --DECOD is null, FAOBJ should not be equal to --TERM

Error Message: The submitted dataset is larger than 5 GB
Description: The submitted dataset is larger than 5 GB

Error Message: '--SOCCD is not a valid MedDRA primary system organ class code
Description: Trigger error when --SOCCD is not a valid MedDRA primary system organ class code

Error Message: '--SOC is not a valid MedDRA primary system organ class
Description: Trigger error when --SOC is not a valid MedDRA primary system organ class

Error Message: '--STTPT is equal to the date of collection or assessment but --STRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT',  'UNKNOWN').
Description: Trigger error when --STRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT', 'UNKNOWN')

Error Message: '--BDSYCD is not a valid MedDRA system organ class code
Description: Trigger error when --BDSYCD is not a valid MedDRA system organ class code

Error Message: First 2 characters of prefixed variable within custom domain do not match the DOMAIN value.
Description: Raise an error when the two first characters of a prefixed variable within a custom domain do not match the DOMAIN value.

Error Message: More than 1 record exists per subject per EPOCH with DSCAT = 'DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT = 'STUDY TREATMENT'.
Description: Trigger error when subject has more than one record per Epoch with DSCAT = 'DISPOSITION EVENT' and more than one record where DSSCAT = 'STUDY TREATMENT'

Error Message: More than 1 record exists per subject per EPOCH with DSCAT = 'DISPOSITION EVENT' and DSSCAT = 'STUDY PARTICIPATION'.
Description: Trigger error when subject has more than one record per Epoch with DSCAT = 'DISPOSITION EVENT' and more than one record where DSSCAT = 'STUDY PARTICIPATION'

Error Message: TSVCDVER is not a valid published version (date)
Description: Trigger error when TSVCDREF = 'CDISC' and TSVCDVER is not a valid published version (date)

Error Message: LBORRES is not a continuous measurement but LBORNRHI is not empty.
Description: Raise an error when LBORRES is not a continuous measurement and LBORNRHI is not empty. The interpretation of the guidance is that LBORRES is populated (not null).

Error Message: LBORRES is not a continuous measurment but LBSTNRLO is not empty.
Description: Raise an error when LBORRES is not a continuous measurement and LBSTNRLO is not empty. The interpretation of the guidance is that LBORRES is populated (not null).

Error Message: LBORRES is not a continuous measurement but LBSTNRHI is not empty.
Description: Raise an error when LBORRES is not a continuous measurement and LBSTNRHI is not empty. The interpretation of the guidance is that LBORRES is populated (not null).

Error Message: Custom domains use the reserved or modelled standard names.
Description: Raise an error when custom domains use the reserved or modelled standard names

Error Message: LBORRES is not a continuous measurement but LBORNRLO is not empty.
Description: Raise an error when LBORRES ^= continuous measurement and LBORNRLO is not empty. The interpretation of the guidance is that LBORRES is populated (not null).

Error Message: Milestone associated with RFSTDTC is start of treatment and ARMNRS is not null and different from 'UNPLANNED TREATMENT', but RFSTDTC is not empty.
Description: Raise an error when milestone associated with RFSTDTC is start of treatment and ARMNRS is not null and different from 'UNPLANNED TREATMENT', but RFSTDTC is not null.

Error Message: '--ENDY is not properly calculated per study day algorithm
Description: Study day must be calculated using the algorithm detailed in the SDTMIG.

Error Message: '--STDY is not properly calculated per study day algorithm
Description: Study day must be calculated using the algorithm detailed in the SDTMIG.

Error Message: Verify that LBTOXGR value is not from a numeric scale
Description: Raise a warning when LBTOXGR is not numeric

Error Message: ETCD is not equal to 'UNPLAN' and not equal to TE.ETCD
Description: Raise an error when ETCD is not equal to 'UNPLAN' and not equal to TE.ETCD

Error Message: IDVARVAL and USUBJID are not completed, but IDVAR equals Sequence Number.
Description: Raise an error when IDVARVAL and USUBJID are empty and IDVAR = Sequence Number.

Error Message: Related record is present in the parent domain dataset but FAOBJ is not equal to the "TERM", "TRT" or "DECOD" of the parent domain.
Description: Raise an error when a related record is present in the parent domain dataset but FAOBJ is not equal to the --TERM, --TRT or --DECOD of the parent domain.

Error Message: '--SCAT is equal to --BODSYS.
Description: Raise an error when --SCAT = --BODSYS.

Error Message: '--CAT is equal to --BODSYS.
Description: Raise an error when --CAT = --BODSYS.

Error Message: ETCD value is greater than 8
Description: The length of ETCD should be no greater than 8

Error Message: At least one of TEENRL and TEDUR must be populated.
Description: Either TEENRL or TEDUR must be present for each Element.

Error Message: Scheduled or Contingent visit is not unique within subject
Description: When VISITNUM is present in TV.VISITNUM, SV.VISITNUM must be unique within subject

Error Message: TSVALNF is not equal to NA when TSPARAMCD=INDIC
Description: TSVALNF is not equal to NA when TSPARAMCD=INDIC

Error Message: '--ENRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT', 'ONGOING', 'AFTER', 'UNKNOWN')
Description: Trigger error when --ENRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT', 'ONGOING', 'AFTER', 'UNKNOWN')

Error Message: '--STRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT', 'AFTER', 'UNKNOWN')
Description: Trigger error when --STRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT', 'AFTER', 'UNKNOWN') and --STTPT is prior to the date of collection or assessment.

Error Message: The set  ('INTMODEL’, 'INTTYPE','PCLASS') is not in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated.
Description: The set  ('INTMODEL’, 'INTTYPE','PCLASS') is not in the list of TSPARAMCD with TSVAL populated.

Error Message: A required value of TSPARMCD is not found
Description: A required value of TSPARMCD is not found

Error Message: VISITDY is not null when VISITNUM is not in TV.VISITNUM
Description: Trigger error if VISITDY is populated when VISITNUM is not in TV.

Error Message: EX is not present in study when study includes protocol-specified study treatment
Description: Trigger error when study includes protocol-specified study treatment and EX is not present

Error Message: '--SCAT is equal to --DECOD.
Description: Raise an error when --SCAT = --DECOD.

Error Message: '--CAT is equal to --DECOD.
Description: Raise an error when --CAT = --DECOD.

Error Message: AEREASND is present.
Description: Raise an error when AEREASND is present.

Error Message: Missing --TRTV value, when --VAMT value is populated.
Description: Raise an error when --VAMT is not empty, but --TRTV is empty.

Error Message: '--TOXGR should not be null when --TOX is populated.
Description: Raise an error when --TOX is not empty, but --TOXGR is empty.

Error Message: '--ORRES is missing even though --LOBXFL= "Y" and either --DRVFL is not present in dataset or is not equal to "Y"
Description: Verify that --ORRES is not null when --LOBXFL = Y and --DRVFL= null or --DRVFL is not present in the dataset

Error Message: AGETXT is present.
Description: Raise an error when AGETXT is present.

Error Message: SPECIES is present.
Description: Raise an error when SPECIES is present.

Error Message: SBSTRAIN is present.
Description: Raise an error when SBSTRAIN is present.

Error Message: Value of --LOBXFL must be 'Y' or null
Description: Raise an error when --LOBXFL is not 'Y' or null

Error Message: ELEMENT variable has a non-null value when ETCD has a value of 'UNPLAN'
Description: Verify that ELEMENT value is blank when ETCD is equal to UNPLAN

Error Message: DM.RFICDTC is not equal to the earliest DSSTDTC, when DSTERM indicates Informed consent obtained.
Description: DM.RFICDTC must equal the earliest DS.DSSTDTC when DSTERM indicates informed consent obtained.

Error Message: Throw error when TSPARMCD is equal to COMPTRT, CURTRT, or TRT and TSVCDREF ^= UNII
Description: When TSPARMCD is equal to COMPTRT, CURTRT or TRT, TSVCDREF should equal UNII

Error Message: RFENDTC is not blank when ARMNRS is provided.
Description: Raise an error when ARMNRS is not blank and RFENDTC is provided.

Error Message: Value for ARMNRS is populated, when both ARMCD and ACTARMCD values are populated
Description: Verify the value for ARMNRS, when both ARMCD and ACTARMCD values are populated

Error Message: ARMNRS is missing when ARM value is missing
Description: Verify ARMNRS is not null when ARM is null

Error Message: '--BODSYS is not empty and --BDSYCD is empty
Description: Raise an error if --BODSYS is not empty, --BDSYCD is empty

Error Message: ARMNRS value is missing when ARMCD value is missing
Description: Verify ARMNRS is not null when ARMCD is null

Error Message: AEOCCUR is present in AE dataset.
Description: Raise an error when AEOCCUR exists in AE dataset.

Error Message: Supplemental qualifier dataset associated with a split dataset is greater than 8 characters in length
Description: When a supplemental qualifier dataset is associated with a split dataset, the dataset name length must not be greater than 8 characters.

Error Message: ACTARM is empty, but ARMNRS is not completed.
Description: Raise an error when ACTARM is empty and ARMNRS is not completed.

Error Message: ACTARMCD is empty, but ARMNRS is not completed.
Description: Raise an error when ACTARMCD is empty and ARMNRS is not completed.

Error Message: SSSTRESC = 'DEAD', but SSDTC < max DS.DSSTDTC.
Description: Raise an error when SSSTRESC = 'DEAD' and SSDTC < max DS.DSSTDTC.

Error Message: TSPARMCD = RANDQT record is not present
Description: At least one observation where TSPARMCD = TRT is present and there is only one investigational treatment

Error Message: CODTC is populated when IDVAR is also populated
Description: Trigger error when IDVAR is not null and CODTC is not null

Error Message: IDVAR should not be missing when RDOMAIN is not in (empty, DM).
Description: IDVAR must be specified.

Error Message: RDOMAIN has a missing value but IDVAR has a non-missing value
Description: Verify IDVAR is null when RDOMAIN is null

Error Message: EXVAMT is present when EC exists.
Description: When EC exists, EXVAMT should not be used.

Error Message: One of following variables is not present in the dataset; STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID (or POOLID) or --SEQ.
Description: Raise an error when one of the following variables; STUDYID, DOMAIN, USUBJID (or POOLID) or --SEQ is not present in the dataset.

Error Message: '--ORRES cannot be null when --STAT is null or --DRVFL not equal to 'Y'
Description: Verify that --ORRES is not missing when either --STAT is null or --DRVFL not equal to 'Y'

Error Message: LNKID variable is only found in one domain.
Description: Verify that when --LNKID is present in one domain it is also present in another domain.

Error Message: LNKGRP variable is not found in any of the other domains.
Description: Verify that when --LNKGRP is present in one domain it is also present in another domain.

Error Message: '--SCAT is equal to --CAT
Description: Trigger error when --SCAT is not null and --SCAT is equal to --CAT

Error Message: '--ENRF is populated when --OCCUR = "N"
Description: When --OCCUR = 'N', --ENRF must not be populated

Error Message: '--TESTCD is equal to 'MULTIPLE'
Description: Raise an error when --TESTCD = 'MULTIPLE'

Error Message: '--ENRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT', 'ONGOING', 'UNKNOWN')
Description: Trigger error when --ENRTPT is not in ('BEFORE', 'COINCIDENT', 'ONGOING', 'UNKNOWN')

Error Message: Length of dataset name of SUPP-- dataset is greater than 8.
Description: Trigger error if length of dataset name is greater than 8

Error Message: '--DIR variable is present, when --LOC variable does not exist in a dataset.

Description: When study does not use multi-stage arm assignments and ARM is populated, ARM must be present in TA.ARM. This rule has been executed to identify all cases when ARM is not present in TA.ARM and therefore acknowledges that false positives may be recorded when multi-stage arm assignments are in use.

Description: Trigger error when study does not use multi-stage arm assignments and ACTARMCD ^= null, and ACTARMCD is not in TA.ARMCD

This rule has been executed to identify all cases when ACTARM is not present in TA.ARM and therefore acknowledges that false positives may be recorded when multi-stage arm assignments are in use.

Description: Raise an error when AGEU is not blank and AGE is blank.

Description: Raise an error when AGE is not blank and AGEU is blank.

Description: Raise an error when AESDISAB is completed and value is not 'Y' or 'N'

Description: Raise an error when AESMIE is completed and value is not 'Y' or 'N'

Description: Raise an error when AESOD is completed and value is not 'Y' or 'N'

Description: Raise an error when AESLIFE is completed and value is not 'Y' or 'N'

Description: Raise an error when AESHOSP is completed and value is not 'Y' or 'N'

Description: Raise an error when AESDTH is completed and value is not 'Y' or 'N'
